content:
# Session 40 (iter-040) ‚Äî review

## No prover lane (4th consecutive) ‚Äî terminal closeout
- `attempts_raw.jsonl` line 1 = `{no_prover_lane: true, iter: 40}`. `meta.json` / `prover.jsonl` empty.
  `sync_leanok` iter=40 sha=`8dd7f98` +0/‚àí0, `chapters_touched: []`. Single extraction commit `c53d9c9`
  (no `.lean` edit since iter-036; no regression possible).
- Sorry count before/after: unchanged. No targets attempted (mechanical no-dispatch).

## State verified (mine, this iter)
- Sorry grep `AlgebraicJacobian/**`: only `Picard/QuotScheme.lean` (4 typed œá sorries L126/165/201/228 +
  4 docstring mentions) and `Picard/RelativeSpec.lean` (7) carry sorries ‚Äî both out-of-leg.
- `Picard/SectionGradedRing.lean`: the lone `grep sorry` hit is at L3880 inside a **comment** explaining
  why `Œì(L)` non-commutativity blocks a claim ‚Äî NOT a typed `sorry`. File is sorry-free, as recorded.
- Decision (plan) re-weighed and declined all three non-options: re-probe œá (genuinely cohomology/Snapper-
  gated), open cohomology megaleg (overreach; critic-validated H‚Å∞ scope, not USER-opened), split the done
  4k-line file (busywork; split directive targets files with UNPROVED theorems ‚Äî this one has none). Sound.

## Leg state ‚Äî DELIVERED axiom-clean, await merge
Closable scope all in: `Grassmannian.represents` + `tautologicalQuotient_epi` + B1‚ÄìB7 assoc + ‚àÄL
`GSemiring` + invertible-L `GCommSemiring` + module `sectionGradedModule_gmodule`. No live frontier.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. No chapter edit; sync +0/‚àí0; no rename / wrong marker to correct.

## Blueprint doctor ‚Äî out-of-cone, do NOT edit
`logs/iter-040/blueprint-doctor.md`: dormant inherited chapters only ‚Äî `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange`
(2 phantom `covers` for non-existent `FlatBaseChange{,Global}.lean` + 13 broken `\ref`),
`Picard_GlueDescent` (4 broken `\cref`/`\uses`), `Picard_QuotScheme` (13 broken `\cref`). No prover near
them ‚áí phantom covers misroute nothing. Merge-time per Archon memory. Surfaced in recommendations.

## Coverage debt
`archon dag-query unmatched` ‚âà 356 `lean_aux` nodes ‚Äî inherited parent-blueprinted construction decls
(single-commit extraction). Merge-time; not this leg's debt.

## Notes (LOW)
- TO_USER.md current + accurate (2 live bullets); left as-is.
- No new Knowledge Base patterns this iter (no proving).

## Subagent skips
- lean-auditor: no `.lean` file modified this iter (no prover lane, 0 edits); prior verdict (iter-036) had
  no live must-fix. Both skip conditions met.
- lean-vs-blueprint-checker: no `.lean` files received prover work this iter (no edits to verify).
